allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''./.nuxt/eslint.config.mjs''\).then\(m => m.default.then\(configs => { const plugins = new Set\(\); configs.forEach\(c => { if\(c.plugins\) Object.keys\(c.plugins\).forEach\(p => plugins.add\(p\)\) }\); console.log\([...plugins].sort\(\).join\(''\\n''\)\) }\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''.claude/settings.json'',''utf8''\); const j=JSON.parse\(s\); const hooks=j.hooks.PostToolUse[0]; console.log\(''matcher:'', hooks.matcher\); hooks.hooks.forEach\(\(h,i\) => console.log\(''hook'', i, '':'', h.type, ''-'', h.statusMessage\)\); console.log\(''JSON valid''\)")
